title: President Biden moves to triple tariffs on Chinese steel and aluminum
shortDescription: President Biden is moving to triple the rates of tariffs on steel and aluminum from China amid concerns about the survival of the U.S. steel industry.

title: WWIII? U.S. voters must weigh foreign affairs impact on 2024 election
shortDescription: Voters, activists and foreign policy experts say the U.S. becoming entangled in a larger global conflict is concerning but not top of mind – yet.

title: The southern border is top of mind for voters thousands of miles away
shortDescription: New Hampshire voters say immigration is their number one issue come November, part of a growing national anxiety, experts say.

title: Democrats hit another obstacle in trying to get Biden on Ohio ballot
shortDescription: A Biden ballot brouhaha as Democrats try to certify the president ahead of convention, but GOP Ohio officials say that's not allowed.

title: Who is running in Alabama's 2nd Congressional District this November?
shortDescription: Democrat Shomari Figures will face off against Republican Caroleene Dobson in the November general election.

title: Caroleene Dobson wins GOP nomination in 2nd Congressional District
shortDescription: The attorney defeated opponent Dick Brewbaker and will face the Democratic nominee Shomari Figures in November.

title: Figures wins Democratic runoff in AL's 2nd Congressional District
shortDescription: The former Obama administration official defeated opponent Anthony Daniels and face the Republican nominee Caroleene Dobson in November.

title: Trump Trial Day 2: 7 jurors chosen, Trump warned over intimidation
shortDescription: While some said jury selection could take weeks, 7 jurors were seated Tuesday, meaning opening arguments in the hush money case could start in days.

title: Trump trial jury begins to take shape
shortDescription: The first six jurors have been picked for Donald Trump's hush money trial. It's Tuesday's news.

title: Can the court find fair and impartial jurors for Donald Trump's trial?
shortDescription: As of Tuesday, April 16, six jurors have been selected to serve on the jury in Donald Trump's hush money trial.

title: Dismissed Trump trial juror reveals jury questions
shortDescription: Kara McGee, a dismissed Trump juror, says she was pleasantly surprised at the honesty of her fellow jurors.

title: OnPolitics: House Speaker Mike Johnson's job is in jeopardy
shortDescription: House Speaker Mike Johnson's job is in danger after another conservative hardliner publicly came out in support of forcibly removing him.

title: Marines attended charity event, not Trump fundraiser | Fact check
shortDescription: The Marines attended a nonpartisan Mar-a-Lago event hosted by a veteran suicide prevention nonprofit. Trump isn't affiliated with the organization.

title: Trump's hush money trial has begun: What to know | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Plus, Trump Media's stock price plummeted Monday. Congress is grappling with foreign aid after Iran's attack on Israel. It's all on The Excerpt.

title: Recap: 7 jurors selected to serve in Donald Trump's hush money trial
shortDescription: Jury selection continued on day 2 of former President Donald Trump's hush money criminal trial in New York, with social media posts being read aloud
